cover.title: Join the small talk
cover.sub: 6 lines for any event with strangers

phrases.when: Walking up and opening. The first line is the hard part.

phrases.en: Do you know many people here?
phrases.when: An easy way in that works at any event.

phrases.en: Sorry, can you say that again?
phrases.when: They said something and it went by too fast.

phrases.nl: Mijn Nederlands is nog niet zo goed.
phrases.en: My Dutch isn't that good yet.
phrases.when: Takes the pressure off and keeps you in Dutch.
Keep them talking. You barely have to say a thing.

phrases.nl: Ik ga even wat drinken halen.
phrases.en: I'm going to grab a drink.
phrases.when: An easy, friendly way to step away.

cta.title: Save this before you go
cta.sub: Send it to the friend you always go with.
